name: Real Poutine
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a deep fryer or deep heavy skillet to 365 degrees F (185 degrees C). 2. While the oil is heating, begin to warm the gravy. Place fries into the hot oil, and cook until light brown, about 8 to 10 minutes. Cook fries in batches if necessary. 3. Remove fries to a paper towel-lined plate to drain. 4. Place fries on a serving platter and sprinkle the cheese curds over them. 5. Ladle warm gravy over the fries and cheese, and serve immediately.
simpleInstructions: 1. Heat oil and warm gravy. 2. Fry potatoes until light brown, then drain. 3. Place fries on a platter, add the cheese curds, and pour the gravy on top. Serve immediately.
